items.message:
Merge upstream main into PR branch and sync pnpm-lock.yaml

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

items.body:
✅ **pnpm-lock.yaml conflict resolution complete**

The upstream `main` branch was merged into this PR branch in commit `2a3c7ecae`. The merge completed without conflicts — git auto-merged `pnpm-lock.yaml` cleanly (verified by checking out `pnpm-lock.yaml` from `FETCH_HEAD`, which resulted in no changes).

**Summary of what was done:**
- Fetched latest `main` from `https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-js`
- Merged `FETCH_HEAD` into `aw/pnpm-lock-conflict-resolver` — no conflicts in any file
- Confirmed `pnpm-lock.yaml` matches upstream `main` (via `git checkout FETCH_HEAD -- pnpm-lock.yaml`)
- Pushed the merge commit to the PR branch
